# Mybbor — Robby McCullough's AI Lab

> The experimental side of Robby McCullough (co-founder of Beaver Builder): AI-assisted projects, ham radio tools, and vibe-coded experiments, mostly built with Claude Code. Distinct from his professional/personal-brand blog at robbymccullough.com.

## Projects

- [Petaluma & Sonoma Ham Radio Frequencies](https://mybbor.com/petaluma-sonoma-ham-radio.html): A personal, opinionated ham radio frequency guide for Petaluma and Sonoma County, CA. Two downloadable CHIRP-compatible CSVs (repeaters, ACS emergency, APRS, NOAA weather, FRS/GMRS, marine VHF, aviation): "All Channels" with 155 channels including AM airband, and "No AM" with 140 channels for radios that cannot receive AM, such as the Baofeng UV-5R. Tested with a UV-5R via CHIRP.
- [North Bay Ham Dashboard](https://mybbor.com/ham-dashboard.html): A live situational-awareness dashboard (local radar, GOES-18 satellite, APRS, fire-watch cameras, space weather, traffic cams) for the North Bay. Callsign KN6KVS.

## Writing

AI-assisted posts, mostly about building the projects above. Index: https://mybbor.com/#writing

- [Side-quest Cathedral](https://mybbor.com/posts/side-quest-cathedral/)
- [I Just Wanted a Ham Radio Cheat Sheet](https://mybbor.com/posts/i-just-wanted-a-ham-radio-cheat-sheet/)
- [Is WordPress Cooked?](https://mybbor.com/posts/is-wordpress-cooked/)
